data.content:
Implemented last-hyphen prefix stripping for beat and terminal IDs so multi-hyphen project names keep the full project prefix intact. Updated the shared strip helpers in beat navigation/display, terminal tab ID splitting, and agent history ID stripping, and added regressions for feature-builder-style IDs.

Validation on commit bc0930a40613 and branch feat/foolery-9b5c-prefix: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
